title: My Addresses (CAR)
manageYourAddresses: Manage your citizen addresses and verifications
primaryAddressDescription: Your primary address is your main residence. You can only have one primary address at a time.
secondaryAddressDescription: Secondary addresses can include work locations, temporary residences, or other relevant locations.
retirePrimaryDescription: This will remove your primary address. You can set a new primary address at any time.
removeSecondaryDescription: This will remove this secondary address from your profile. This action cannot be undone.
noPrimaryAddressMessage: You haven't set a primary address yet. Your primary address is your main residence.
noSecondaryAddressesMessage: No secondary addresses registered. Add work locations, temporary residences, or other relevant addresses.
noAddressHistoryMessage: No address history available yet. Historical addresses will appear here when you update or retire addresses.
searchByAddress: Search by address, UAC code, or landmark...
tryDifferentSearch: Try searching with a different term or UAC code
scopeDescription: Choose whether you're registering for the entire building or a specific unit within it.
secondaryScopeDescription: Choose whether this secondary address covers the entire building or a specific unit.
uacDescription: Enter the official UAC for this address. This should be provided by the National Address Registry.
secondaryUacDescription: Enter the official UAC for this secondary address.
unitUacDescription: Enter the UAC for the specific unit within the building.
effectiveFromDescription: Date when this address becomes your primary residence.
setPrimaryAddressForVerification: Set your primary address in the Citizen Address Repository before requesting verification.
addSecondaryAddressForVerification: Add a secondary address in the Citizen Address Repository before requesting verification.
verifyOwnershipDescription: Submit legal documents to verify your ownership or residency for this address.
addressVerificationDescription: First set your address in the Citizen Address Repository, then request verification.
needAddressForVerification: You need to set at least one address in the Citizen Address Repository before requesting verification.
actionRequiredDescription: Please review the notes above and update your verification request with the requested changes.
noVerificationRequestsMessage: You haven't submitted any verification requests yet.
legacyVerificationMessage: This verification request was created with the old system. To edit it, you'll need to:
legacyStep1: 1. First add this address to your Citizen Address Repository
legacyStep2: 2. Then create a new verification request for that address
legacyStep3: 3. The old request will remain for reference

publicPortal.title: Equatorial Guinea Address Portal
publicPortal.subtitle: Public address search and verification system
publicPortal.searchDescription: Search by street name, UAC (Unique Address Code), city or building name
publicPortal.searchPlaceholder: Enter UAC, street name or location...
publicPortal.qrClickHint: Click above to generate and download QR code
publicPortal.footerAgencyName: National Digital Address Agency of Equatorial Guinea
publicPortal.footerTagline: Serving citizens with reliable address information since 2024
publicPortal.searchRequiredDescription: Please enter an address, UAC or location to search
publicPortal.noResultsDescription: No public addresses found matching your search
publicPortal.searchErrorDescription: Error searching addresses. Please try again.
publicPortal.noAddressForUac: No address found for this UAC

noRequestsDescription: You haven't submitted any address requests yet.
descriptionPlaceholder: Describe any additional details about this address...
uploadProofDocument: Upload proof document (lease, deed, utility bill, etc.)
proofExamples: Examples: lease agreement, utility bill, property deed
addPhotoLocation: Add a photo of the location
locationCapturedDesc: We filled latitude and longitude from your current position.
locationErrorDesc: Unable to get your location. Please enter coordinates manually.
locationNotSupportedDesc: Your browser does not support geolocation.
invalidFileTypeDesc: Please upload an image (JPG, PNG, WEBP).
invalidFileTypeDoc: Please upload a PDF or image (JPG, PNG, WEBP).
uploadFailedDesc: We couldn't upload your photo. Try again.
uploadFailedDocDesc: We couldn't upload your document. Try again.
mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to submit a request.
fillAllRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
proofOfOwnershipRequiredDesc: Upload a supporting document to continue.
submitRequestDescription: Provide the address details and optional documents to request creation in the NAR.
documentReadyUpload: You can upload a different document if needed.
justificationPlaceholder: Explain why this address should be created in the registry
requestSubmittedToast: Address request submitted. You can now proceed with residency/ownership verification.
requestSubmittedDesc: Your address request has been submitted. You can now optionally verify your residency or ownership to expedite the approval process.
requestSubmittedInfo: Your address request has been submitted for review. To verify ownership/residency, you'll need to first set this address in your Citizen Address Repository.
exportVariousFormats: Export your addresses in various formats compatible with Google Maps and other mapping services.
csvDescription: Compatible with Excel, Sheets, and other spreadsheet applications
kmlDescription: Import into Google Earth, ArcGIS, and other GIS software
jsonDescription: Structured data format for developers and APIs
csvDownloadedGoogleMaps: CSV file downloaded. Upload it to Google My Maps to visualize your addresses.
noAddressesMatch: No addresses match your current filters
exportedAddressesDescription: Exported addresses from the National Address Registry
reviewAndVerifyPending: Review and verify pending address requests
